REMARK: EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF KAREN CUNNINGHAM)FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: JULY-11-2023 AT 3:30PM}
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) JULIA KEMPLE-JOHNSON FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF KAREN CUNNINGHAM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JULIA KEMPLE-JOHNSON (LEGAL INTERN - REPRESENTATIVE) VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUNNINGHAM, KAREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. BASED ON THE GROUP SETTING FOR THE TRIP, AND PLAINTIFF'S COLLECTION OF THE FULL VALUE OF THE RESERVATION FROM HER TRAVELING COMPANIONS, PLAINTIFF CANNOT SHOW ANY LOSS FROM HER CLAIM, EVEN IF OTHERWISE SUPPORTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
